results.rendered_html:
ayāta a. Not &c. gone.
Comp.
— pūrva a. following, succeeding, subsequent to.
— yāma a. not old or weakened, not stale, fresh, not worn out by use; ˚maṃ ca yauvanaṃ  Dk. 123  fresh, blooming; ˚maṃ vayaḥ 158 ; chaṃdāṃsyayātayāmāni  Bhāg.  (where Śrīdhara says a˚ = vigatadoṣāṇi free from faults, faultless, pure.
— (maṃ) N. of certain texts of the Yajurveda revealed to Yājñavalkya. ˚yāmatā freshness, unimpaired nature, strength, or vigour, purity.)
— yāman a. Ved. not weak, fresh.
